title: Simple Warden
description: A simple datapack that adds an advancement for killing the warden
body:
This datapack is pretty simple and self-explanatory. It is a datapack that adds an advancement for killing the warden.

If you'd like to hide the advancement the hidden value has been left in the json file for ease of access,
change line 9 from "hidden": false -> true and it should hide the advancement.

Old releases of anything I make are always available on my github page.
